business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: 31 years in business with stable management (22 years with current management)
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
No claims in prior three policy years (2022-2024)
No cancellations in prior insurance history
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained
LOC-004 Dayton manufacturing building built in 1992 (older structure)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Zero claims reported across the three prior policy years (2022-2024) with Chubb, Hartford, and Liberty Mutual. No cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. 31 years in business, 22 years with current management. 95 full-time and 18 part-time employees. Annual revenue $48,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM. Nine premises across Ohio totaling approximately 1,948,500 square feet, including warehouse, manufacturing, and office occupancies.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. 8 of 9 locations sprinklered (LOC-007 Toledo not sprinklered). Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13/13R. No EV charging stations. MSDS not maintained. Lockout/tagout procedures not in place. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history reflects zero claims for 2022 (Chubb Limited, $456,514.10), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services, $419,914.35), and 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance, $392,002.31). No cancellations across the three-year history.
